case_title: JOSE FRANCISCO LOPEZ VS. JOSE ROMERO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EMPIRE MAINTENANCE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JOSE FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JOSE ROMERO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EMPIRE MAINTENANCE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JOSE FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSE ROMERO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EMPIRE MAINTENANCE $5,551.54 PRINCIPAL, $31.55 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,788.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
